use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::Semaphore;

async fn upload_file(path: &str) -> Result<(), Error> {
    // BAD: new semaphore created for each upload operation
    let sem = Arc::new(Semaphore::new(10));
    let permit = sem.acquire().await?;
    
    let data = tokio::fs::read(path).await?;
    send_to_storage(&data).await?;
    
    drop(permit);
    Ok(())
}

async fn download_file(url: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>, Error> {
    // BAD: another new semaphore per download
    let sem = Arc::new(Semaphore::new(10));
    let permit = sem.acquire().await?;
    
    let data = fetch_from_network(url).await?;
    
    drop(permit);
    Ok(data)
}
